thread.subject: Can't log into my account after password reset

messages.subject: Can't log into my account after password reset
messages.textBody:
Hi there,

I reset my password yesterday using the link sent to my email, but now whenever I try to log in with the new password it says "Invalid credentials". I've tried multiple times and even cleared my browser cache.

Can you help me get back in?

Thanks,
Alice

thread.subject: Billing charge appeared twice this month

messages.subject: Billing charge appeared twice this month
messages.textBody:
Hello,

I just checked my bank statement and I was charged $49 twice on April 1st for my Pro subscription. My account email is bob.smith@outlook.com.

Could you please refund the duplicate charge? I've attached my bank statement screenshot.

Regards,
Bob

thread.subject: Feature request: dark mode for mobile app

messages.subject: Feature request: dark mode for mobile app
messages.textBody:
Hi team,

I love the product but I use it a lot at night and the bright white background is really hard on the eyes. Many apps have dark mode now — any plans to add it to the mobile app?

Would really appreciate this!
Carla

messages.subject: Integration with Zapier keeps disconnecting
messages.textBody:
Hey support,

I've set up a Zap that triggers whenever a new record is created in your platform. It works fine for about a day or two, then Zapier says the connection is broken and I have to reconnect it manually.

This is really disrupting my workflow. Is there a known issue with OAuth token expiry?

David

messages.subject: Re: Integration with Zapier keeps disconnecting
messages.textBody:
Hi David,

Thanks for reaching out. You're right — we're aware of an issue with OAuth tokens expiring earlier than expected. Our engineering team is actively working on a fix.

In the meantime, you can use a long-lived API key instead of OAuth for the Zapier integration. I'll send you the steps.

Best,
Support Team

thread.subject: Export to CSV not including all columns

messages.subject: Export to CSV not including all columns
messages.textBody:
Hello,

When I export my data to CSV, the "custom tags" and "last activity" columns are missing even though they show up on screen. I need these for a report I'm putting together.

Is this a known bug? Running Chrome 124 on macOS.

Emma

thread.subject: API rate limit hit unexpectedly on free plan

messages.subject: API rate limit hit unexpectedly on free plan
messages.textBody:
Hi,

According to your docs the free plan allows 1000 API calls/day. I'm only making around 300 calls and I'm getting 429 errors. Something seems off.

Frank

messages.subject: Re: API rate limit hit unexpectedly on free plan
messages.textBody:
Hi Frank,

Thanks for flagging this. Could you share your workspace ID so I can check your usage logs? It's possible there's a per-minute burst limit being hit rather than the daily cap.

Looking into it now.

Support

thread.subject: Team member invite email never arrived

messages.subject: Team member invite email never arrived
messages.textBody:
Hi,

I invited three colleagues to my workspace but none of them received the email. I checked the spam folder too — nothing there. The invites show as "Pending" in my dashboard.

Grace

messages.subject: Re: Team member invite email never arrived
messages.textBody:
Hi Grace,

I've resent the invites manually from our end. Your colleagues should receive them within the next few minutes. Could you confirm once they check?

Also — are their email addresses on a corporate domain that might be filtering bulk senders?

Thanks,
Support

messages.subject: Dashboard loading slowly on Firefox
messages.textBody:
Hey,

The main dashboard takes about 12 seconds to load on Firefox 125. Chrome is fine at under 2 seconds. I've disabled extensions and the problem persists.

Henry

messages.subject: Re: Dashboard loading slowly on Firefox
messages.textBody:
Hi Henry,

Thanks for the detail — that's helpful. We've reproduced the issue on Firefox 125 internally. It looks like a CSS animation that isn't GPU-accelerated in Firefox is causing the bottleneck.

A fix has been merged and will go out in our next release (this week). We'll update you once it's live.

Apologies for the inconvenience!
Support

messages.subject: Webhook payload missing custom fields
messages.textBody:
Hello,

We're using your webhook to sync data to our internal system. The payload includes standard fields fine, but the custom fields we've defined (e.g. "client_id", "project_code") are not appearing in the JSON body.

Is there a setting to include custom fields in webhook payloads?

Isabella

messages.subject: Re: Webhook payload missing custom fields
messages.textBody:
Hi Isabella,

Custom fields in webhook payloads are available on our Business plan and above. You're currently on the Starter plan.

If you'd like to upgrade, I can set up a trial of Business for your workspace for 14 days so you can test the feature. Let me know!

Support

thread.subject: How do I downgrade my subscription?

messages.subject: How do I downgrade my subscription?
messages.textBody:
Hi,

I'd like to downgrade from Pro to Free. I can't find the option in settings — only an upgrade button. How do I do this?

James

messages.subject: Re: How do I downgrade my subscription?
messages.textBody:
Hi James,

To downgrade: go to Settings → Billing → Manage Plan → then click "Switch to Free". The change takes effect at the end of your current billing cycle.

Let me know if you run into any trouble!

Support

messages.subject: Re: How do I downgrade my subscription?
messages.textBody: Perfect, found it! Thanks so much — done now.

thread.subject: Two-factor authentication not working with Authy

messages.subject: Two-factor authentication not working with Authy
messages.textBody:
Hello,

I enabled 2FA using Authy but every time I try to log in, the code is rejected even though the time is correct. I've tried regenerating the code multiple times.

Kate

messages.subject: Re: Two-factor authentication not working with Authy
messages.textBody:
Hi Kate,

This is usually caused by a clock drift issue. In Authy, go to Settings → Account → Enable Backups, then try syncing time. Also make sure your phone's time is set to "automatic".

If that doesn't work, I can reset your 2FA so you can set it up fresh.

Support

messages.subject: Re: Two-factor authentication not working with Authy
messages.textBody: The time sync fixed it! All working now, thank you.

thread.subject: Bulk import stopped halfway through 500 records

messages.subject: Bulk import stopped halfway through 500 records
messages.textBody:
Hey,

I was importing 500 contacts via CSV and it stopped at record 247 with no error message. The import just shows as "Completed" but only 246 contacts were added.

Liam

messages.subject: Re: Bulk import stopped halfway through 500 records
messages.textBody:
Hi Liam,

I looked at your import log — record 247 had a duplicate email address that caused a silent failure. Our importer stops at the first duplicate by default.

I've enabled the "skip duplicates" setting for your account. Please re-import your full CSV and it should complete successfully.

Support

thread.subject: Password reset link expired too quickly

messages.subject: Password reset link expired too quickly
messages.textBody:
Hi,

The password reset link I got expired before I could use it — it was only valid for 10 minutes and I was in a meeting. Can you make it last longer or resend one?

Alice

messages.subject: Re: Password reset link expired too quickly
messages.textBody:
Hi Alice,

I've sent you a new reset link — this one is valid for 24 hours. We're also looking into extending the default expiry time based on your feedback.

Support

thread.subject: App crashes on iOS 17 when opening notifications

messages.subject: App crashes on iOS 17 when opening notifications
messages.textBody:
Hello,

Every time I tap a push notification on my iPhone (iOS 17.3) the app crashes immediately. Happens 100% of the time. No crash log visible on my end.

Alice

messages.subject: Re: App crashes on iOS 17 when opening notifications
messages.textBody:
Hi Alice,

This was a known issue with deep link handling on iOS 17 — it was fixed in v2.4.1. Please update the app from the App Store and it should resolve the crash.

Support

messages.subject: Invoice PDF not generating correctly
messages.textBody:
Hi,

When I download my invoice as PDF the layout is broken — the table overflows the page and half the total is cut off. Using the latest Chrome.

Bob

messages.subject: Re: Invoice PDF not generating correctly
messages.textBody:
Hi Bob,

There was a PDF rendering bug affecting invoices with more than 5 line items. It's been patched — please try downloading again and it should be formatted correctly.

Support

thread.subject: Can I transfer my account to another email?

messages.subject: Can I transfer my account to another email?
messages.textBody:
Hi team,

I want to change my account email from bob.smith@outlook.com to my work email bob@smithconsulting.com. Is this possible without losing my data or subscription?

Bob

messages.subject: Re: Can I transfer my account to another email?
messages.textBody:
Hi Bob,

Yes, we can transfer your account. I'll need you to verify ownership of both email addresses. Could you reply from bob@smithconsulting.com confirming the transfer?

Support
